mapper.sql:
WHERE status = 'BANNED'
AND role = #{sf.role}
AND name LIKE '%' || #{sf.keyword} || '%'
AND user_id LIKE '%' || #{sf.keyword} || '%'
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET status='BANNED', updated_at=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id=#{user_id}
UPDATE MEMBER SET status='ACTIVE', updated_at=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id=#{user_id}
